headline: Is CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD) Expensive As Its Stock Split Puts Valuation Back In Focus?
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD) is back in focus after its first 4-for-1 stock split took effect in early July, making the stock price more accessible while leaving the company’s underlying business value unchanged. See our latest analysis for CrowdStrike Holdings. That stock split comes on top of a strong run for CrowdStrike Holdings, with the share price at $199.38 after a 1 month share price return of 18.85% and a 3 year total shareholder return of more than 4x. This suggests momentum has been...

headline: CrowdStrike (CRWD) Sees 5x AIDR Demand As Identity Push Broadens Its Platform
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) is reporting strong customer adoption for its new AI Detection and Response, or AIDR, product category. Management points to a fivefold increase in demand for AIDR and a quarter that set a record for new annual recurring revenue, or ARR. The company has joined the OpenID Foundation and partnered with IDPro, extending its cybersecurity platform into identity security beyond endpoint protection. CrowdStrike Holdings is best known for its Falcon platform,...
